name: The Pharisee and the Tax Collector
oracleText: At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, draw a card. Otherwise, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
flavorText: "God be merciful to me a sinner." — Luke 18:13
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Pharisee and the Publican" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Pharisee and the Publican
classics.sourceNotes: Exactly matches the contrast at the center of the parable.
